title: JKG® 600 x DRESSMAKER PINS - Tailor Straight Pins Sewing Clothing craft Satin Hobbies dress clothes - In Plastic Box
features: ✅STEEL MADE: These pins are manufactured from tempered steel and can pass through multiple layers of fabric easily.
✅600 PACK: Elevate your satin hobby pursuits with this set of standard straight 600 pins, meticulously crafted for precision and ease of use.
✅PERFECT SIZE: Standard size straight pins 0.65mm x 28mm.
✅ VERSATILE DRESSMAKER PINS: Perfect for all your sewing needs, these tailor straight pins are designed for versatility, from garment construction to clothing DIY projects.
description: Introducing our set of 600 Dressmaker Pins, essential for any sewing or crafting project. These tailor straight pins are versatile, suitable for various applications such as garment construction, clothing DIY projects, and satin hobby pursuits. Crafted with precision, these clothing craft pins are housed in a convenient plastic box for easy storage and accessibility. Elevate your dressmaking tools with this comprehensive set, perfect for both beginners and experienced seamstresses. Ideal for use in your craft room, these pins are a must-have for anyone engaged in clothing construction and sewing endeavors. Upgrade your sewing essentials with this collection of high-quality dressmaker pins, designed to meet the demands of your creative projects.
